title: 2.4mm Nylon Strimmer Wire, 328 Feet 100M Round Strimmer Line Strong Trimmer Cord for Garden Grass Trimmers Electric (Orange)
features: PREMIUM QUALITY - Made of quality nylon, the strimmer line is heavy-duty and durable to use and not easy to break nor get tangled and snap off from the throttle
GREAT GARDEN HELPER - This replacement strimmer wire is designed with round shape with heavy duty nylon to make the wire sharp enough to cut your weeds and grass quickly and easily

SIZE - Diameter : 2.4mm, Length: Approx 100 meters. 50 meters per roll. 2.4mm strimmer lines are perfect for small/medium-duty grass trimmers and long enough to be cut into any length you want and used in various occasions

WIDE APPLICATION - This grass trimmer wire is great for grass in the yard, weeds in the fields, and trim the edges of the lawn. Widely used in courtyard, park, outdoor, garden, landscaping, horticulture, agriculture and other gardening purposes
COMPATIBILITY - Our round strimmer line is suitable for all trimmer heads designed to use 2.4mm line. It is better to check the diameter of your trimmers to make sure is 2.4mm to match
description: Product Description 2.4mm Strimmer Wire 328 feet 2.4mm strimmer line is great for weed trimmer, lawn edger. Ideal for homeowners, gardeners to trim a variety of medium and long grass in small and medium-sized courtyard, outdoor, garden, or park. Product Specifications Material: Nylon Length: Approx 100 meters. 50 meters per roll Diameter: 2.4mm Color: Orange Heavy-Duty Nylon Durable to use and not easy to break Use Occasions 1. The strimmer line can be used to trim grass in the yard, weeds in the fields, and trim the edges of the lawn. 2. It also works great on landscaping, horticulture, agriculture, and other gardening purposes. 3. This grass trimmer wire fits all standard trimmer heads designed for 2.4mm line.
